Random thoughts 2026-04-01

Does anyone actually use the `data/processed/` directory on the cluster?
It's grown to 40TB and half of it is from people who graduated years ago.

Wonder if we could build a lineage tracker that notices when nobody has
touched a file for 18 months and auto-archives. Would probably save more
money than any research we're doing.

(I should be writing chapter 2.)
